data.title: Topnod, a self-hosted wallet, has officially become the official wallet of the Layer 1 public chain Pharos, creating a native Web2 entry point.
data.description: With the Pharos mainnet launch imminent, Topnod wallet has officially become an official partner of the Layer 1 public chain Pharos. As a native Web2 entry point into the Pharos ecosystem, Topnod aims to break down the entry barriers in the RWA (Real-Time Asset Wafer) field through an interactive experience that requires no mnemonic phrases and allows for instant on-the-flying. It is reported that Topnod will provide deep support for the official airdrop event after Pharos TGE, allowing users to directly earn $PROS rewards and conduct on-chain transactions within their Topnod wallets. As one of the core entry points, Topnod will also empower the distribution of RWA assets on the Pharos chain in the future, helping Web2 users seamlessly capture real on-chain earnings.

data.title: Bitdeer currently maintains zero holdings, having sold 177 BTC this week.
data.description: Bitdeer, a Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin mining company, released its latest Bitcoin holdings data on the X platform. As of the week ending April 17, its Bitcoin mining output was 177 BTC, but it sold 177 BTC during the same period, resulting in a net increase of 0 BTC. It currently maintains a zero Bitcoin holding.

data.title: An account with over $500,000 in profits purchased $630,000 worth of MLB regular season games, resulting in the Rangers defeating the Mariners.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer, in the Polymarket prediction event for the MLB regular season game between the Texas Rangers and the Seattle Mariners, an account with profits exceeding $500,000 (0x5d58e38cd0a7e6f5fa67b7f9c2f70dd70df09a15) purchased approximately $630,000 in a winning Rangers position, with an average opening price of 74.4¢. The MLB regular season game between the Texas Rangers and the Seattle Mariners will be played locally. The two teams are closely ranked in their divisions, with the Rangers having a slight advantage. Odaily Seer continues to monitor the prediction market, seeing changes before pricing.

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $664 million yesterday, marking the fourth consecutive day of net inflows.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $664 million yesterday (April 17th, Eastern Time). The BlackRock ETF (IBIT) saw the largest single-day net inflow of $284 million, bringing its total historical net inflow to $64.633 billion. The Fidelity ETF (FBTC) followed with a net inflow of $163 million, bringing its total historical net inflow to $11.009 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs is $101.453 billion, with an ETF net asset value ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of Bitcoin's total market capitalization) of 6.55%, and a cumulative historical net inflow of $57.74 billion.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $127 million yesterday, marking the seventh consecutive day of net inflows.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $127 million yesterday (April 17th, Eastern Time). The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest single-day net inflow was the Fidelity ETF (FETH), with a net inflow of $84.1344 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $2.356 billion. This was followed by the BlackRock ETF (ETHA), with a net inflow of $30.7951 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $11.83 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETFs was $14.263 billion, with an ETF net asset value ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of Ethereum's total market capitalization) of 4.87%, and a historical cumulative net inflow of $11.944 billion.

data.title: U.S. President Trump Addresses Speculation on Military Action in Cuba
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump was questioned aboard Air Force One on April 18 regarding reports suggesting the Pentagon is preparing for military operations in Cuba. According to BlockBeats, Trump did not confirm or deny the reports, stating, "It depends on what your definition of 'military action' is."

data.title: TRON Integrates deBridge's Model Context Protocol for Enhanced Cross-Chain Capabilities
data.description:
TRON has announced the integration of deBridge's Model Context Protocol (MCP) server into its network, enhancing seamless cross-chain execution capabilities. According to Odaily, this integration provides a unified interface that allows developers and AI agents to programmatically access multi-chain liquidity, routing, and transaction execution capabilities, facilitating smoother cross-chain operations.

This integration not only introduces new technological access but also strengthens TRON's infrastructure potential in connecting payments, asset gateways, and multi-chain execution capabilities within AI agent scenarios.

data.title: Bridge Platform Expands Support for Solana-Based USDT Transactions
data.description: Bridge, a payment platform, has announced the addition of support for USDT deposits and withdrawals on the Solana blockchain. According to Foresight News, this new feature is now available to all developers utilizing the Wallets API and providing a Solana address.

data.title: Google's Quantum Computing Paper Highlights Bitcoin Vulnerability
data.description: Google's recent quantum computing research suggests that a Bitcoin key-recovery attack could be executed in approximately nine minutes if a target public key is exposed. According to NS3.AI, this scenario would require fewer than 500,000 physical qubits. The study indicates that around 6.9 million Bitcoin are currently at risk in wallets with exposed public keys.

data.title: Trump says there will be no tolls in the Strait of Hormuz
data.description: US President Trump stated that negotiations regarding a war with Iran will continue over the weekend. When asked whether Iran would impose restrictions or tolls on ships passing through the Strait of Hormuz, Trump said, "Absolutely not," and "There will be no tolls." (NBC News)

data.title: U.S. President Trump Discusses Ongoing Iran War Negotiations
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump announced that discussions regarding the Iran conflict will continue over the weekend. According to Odaily, when questioned about whether Iran might impose restrictions or tolls on ships passing through the Strait of Hormuz, Trump firmly stated, "Absolutely not," and assured there would be no tolls.

data.title: TRON announced the integration of deBridge MCP, expanding the multi-chain execution capabilities of its AI Agents.
data.description: TRON announced the integration of deBridge's Model Context Protocol (MCP) server into the TRON network, enabling seamless cross-chain execution capabilities through a unified interface. This unified interface allows developers and AI Agents to programmatically access multi-chain liquidity, routing, and transaction execution capabilities, resulting in a smoother cross-chain operation experience. This integration not only represents a new technology addition but also further strengthens TRON's infrastructure potential in AI Agent scenarios, connecting payments, asset gateways, and multi-chain execution capabilities.

data.title: U.S. President Trump Announces No Fees for Ships Passing Through Hormuz Strait
data.description: On April 18, U.S. President Donald Trump announced that ships passing through the Hormuz Strait will not be required to pay any fees. According to BlockBeats, this decision comes amid ongoing discussions about maritime trade routes and their economic implications. The Hormuz Strait is a critical passageway for global oil shipments, and this move could have significant impacts on international trade dynamics.

data.title: STOCKS | Nasdaq Hits Record High as Hormuz Strait Reopens
data.description: On April 18, Jin10 reported that the reopening of the Hormuz Strait has led to a record-breaking 13-day rally for the Nasdaq, while U.S. oil prices have plummeted and gold and silver have surged. According to Jin10, Matt Powers, managing partner at Powers Advisory Group, suggests that the market may have reached a short-term bottom, but its overall trajectory remains highly dependent on external factors. Powers warns that the current market is still driven by headlines, with oil price movements, Federal Reserve policy changes, and geopolitical developments potentially altering market sentiment rapidly. He notes that the swift recovery of U.S. stocks indicates a solid underlying trend, reflecting the market's strong resilience. Powers emphasizes that for the market to sustain its upward momentum, broader participation from more sectors and individual stocks is necessary, along with robust corporate earnings performance as a key support factor. UBS strategists also express optimism, stating that U.S. stocks have room for growth in the coming year, supported by strong corporate profit growth and a stable U.S. economy.

data.title: Satellite Images Indicate Continued Risk in Hormuz Strait Shipping
data.description: Recent developments in the Hormuz Strait have raised concerns despite statements suggesting an 'opening' or ceasefire. According to BlockBeats, satellite imagery reveals that two neutral oil tankers, Minerva Evropi and Nissos Keros, have reversed course. Meanwhile, the Sanmar Herald continues to follow the Iran-approved Larak Island route, indicating that shipping operations remain constrained by risks.

data.title: U.S. President Trump Considers Extending Iran Port Blockade
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump announced potential actions regarding Iran. According to BlockBeats, if an agreement is not reached by Wednesday, the ceasefire may not be extended, but the blockade of Iranian ports will continue.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Gold Jewelry Prices Rise in China
data.description: Gold jewelry prices in China have increased today, according to Jin10. The comparison of domestic gold jewelry prices shows that several brands have raised their prices compared to yesterday. Chow Tai Fook's pure gold jewelry and ornaments are priced at 1,475 yuan per gram, marking a 10 yuan increase from the previous day. Lao Feng Xiang's pure gold jewelry is priced at 1,463 yuan per gram, reflecting a 12 yuan rise.

data.title: U.S. President Trump Reports Positive Developments with Iran
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump announced on April 18 that promising news regarding Iran had been received just twenty minutes prior. According to BlockBeats, Trump indicated that progress related to Iran appears to be proceeding smoothly, emphasizing that Iran will not possess nuclear weapons.

data.title: Metaplex Introduces Bonding Curve Launches on Its Platform
data.description: Solana's digital economy platform, Metaplex, has announced the launch of Bonding Curve Launches on its app. According to Foresight News, this feature allows users and AI agents to issue instantly tradable tokens through Metaplex. All Bonding Curve Launches projects are immediately tradable and integrated with partners such as Fomo, Telemetry, Birdeye, Banana Gun, Maestro, Rick Chainley, and Rapid Launch.

data.title: Trump: Progress with Iran seems to be going very well, and most importantly, Iran will not possess nuclear weapons.
data.description: US President Trump: (Regarding Iran) We received some pretty good news twenty minutes ago; developments regarding Iran seem to be going very well. Most importantly, Iran will not possess nuclear weapons. (Jinshi)
